text:
Market today: AI demand is the clear driver, pushing chip names. But watch out for leveraged decay.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL/TRIM candidate (-37.88% PnL) due to its leveraged nature and current status. SPAL also needs attention (-36.98% PnL) for similar reasons. PTNM is a tiny spec (-15.25% PnL) and needs monitoring.

Watch: ASML's forecast hike despite its stock fall is a mixed signal for the AI chip supply chain.

Bottom line: Manage your leveraged positions and watch AI demand indicators.
plays: SOXL: TRIM - consider reducing exposure given leverage and current 'SELL' status.
SPAL: TRIM - evaluate position size due to leverage and 'SELL' status.
NVDA: Consider entry 208.49-208.28, stop 207.97, based on scanner setup.
